caption: The video appears to be set in a medical or clinical environment, as indicated by the presence of an emergency button on the wall and the professional attire of the individuals. Two people are seated, both wearing face masks, suggesting a focus on health and safety protocols. The person on the left is dressed in a black t-shirt with a visible tattoo on their arm, while the person on the right is wearing a dark jacket. A third individual, partially visible on the right side of the frame, seems to be adjusting something near the door, possibly preparing for an interaction or procedure. The text "Day 5" and "Sim Week" suggests that this scene is part of a simulation exercise, likely aimed at training or evaluating medical procedures or patient interactions. The overall atmosphere is calm and focused, indicative of a structured and controlled setting.
